_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of security architecture concepts and enterprise architecture reference models (e.g., Zackman, Federal Enterprise Architecture [FEA]).
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.508), LS-K-003 (LS, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.334). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [concepts, fea, federal, knowledge, models, reference] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.833, R=0.863). R exceeds P by 0.030 — the WIDAI KSA's 19 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 16 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (90.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of security architecture concepts and enterprise architecture referenc" and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.517 > STS 0.334 (gap +0.183). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [architecture, enterprise] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [architecture, enterprise]. DCWF-only: [concepts, fea, federal, knowledge, models, reference]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle].
